raw_text:
*🎓 Dear Students,*

We sincerely apologize for changing the venue once again and truly appreciate your patience, understanding, and continued support throughout the planning process. We know these changes may have caused some inconvenience, and we are grateful for your cooperation.

We are delighted to share that *NetApp has decided to host your Graduation Ceremony at their office*, making this celebration even more special and memorable. This is a wonderful opportunity to celebrate your achievements at the workplace of one of our valued partners.

*📅 Graduation Ceremony Details*

* *📅 Date:* *13th July*
* *⏰ Reporting Time:* *8:00 AM*

*📢 Important Updates:*

* 🚌 *Two-way bus transportation will be arranged for all students.*
* 🍽️ *Breakfast and lunch will be provided for everyone attending the ceremony.*
* 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 *Parents, guardians, and family members are welcome to attend the ceremony.*
* 🎁 *Every student will receive special graduation goodies*, including:
* *Two  Wildcraft bags*
* *A premium branded leather file*
* *Exclusive gifts from NASSCOM Foundation*
* 📜 *Every student will receive a co-branded Graduation Certificate.*
* 👔 *Dress Code:* *Formal attire or your college uniform is mandatory.*
* *Students who actively participate by asking questions or sharing their experiences will receive additional special gifts from NASSCOM Foundation.*
* 🎁 *Parents or guardians attending the ceremony will also receive a special gift as a token of appreciation.*

*✨ Why You Shouldn't Miss This Celebration*
* 🌟 *Senior leaders and distinguished VIP guests* from NetApp, NASSCOM Foundation, and the industry will be joining us.
* 🏢 *Visit the NetApp office and gain valuable industry exposure* by experiencing a professional corporate environment.
* 🤝 *Interact with industry professionals, expand your network, and celebrate your achievement alongside your family.*

This graduation is more than just a ceremony—it's a celebration of your hard work, dedication, and the incredible journey you've completed. We look forward to celebrating this unforgettable milestone with you and your loved ones.

*Thank you once again for your patience, cooperation, and continued support🎓✨*

*Please confirm your attendance as soon as possible so that we can finalize transportation, certificates, meals, seating arrangements, graduation kits, and gifts.*
